name: Spiced Pumpkin Bread2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Butter and flour two 9x5x3-inch loaf pans.
3. Beat sugar and oil in a large bowl until blended.
4. Mix in eggs and pumpkin.
5. Sift flour, cloves, cinnamon, nutmeg, baking soda, salt, and baking powder into another large bowl.
6. Stir the sifted dry ingredients into the pumpkin mixture in two additions.
7. Mix in walnuts, if desired.
8. Divide batter equally between prepared pans.
9. Bake until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, about 1 hour and 10 minutes.
10. Transfer loaves to racks and cool for 10 minutes.
11. Using a sharp knife, cut around the edge of the loaves.
12. Turn loaves out onto racks and cool completely.
13. Serve one of these loaves on the day you make them. Wrap the other in foil and freeze up to one month so that you'll have it on hand for unexpected company.
14. Makes 2 loaves.
